criteria.name: Tests
criteria.evidence: `.venv/bin/pytest tests/ -q` passed on the reviewed HEAD after commit 68ac83a updated tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py to expect the Phase 12 default `hourly` instead of the obsolete `extended`.

criteria.name: Output Files
criteria.evidence: Phase 12 has no artifact-validation expectations (`docs/artifact-validation.json` verdict SKIP), and the reviewed implementation continues to satisfy the specified hourly-output contract.

summary: Lisa review PASS for Phase 12 on current HEAD 68ac83a. The only prior blocking issue was a stale regression expectation in tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py asserting the old `extended` default; that test was updated to the Phase 12-required `hourly` default, and the required full-suite run `.venv/bin/pytest tests/ -q` is now green. Artifact validation and pre-flight are SKIP for this phase, and Martin lint reports only medium/low issues, none of which force rejection under the review rules.
